user_request: Prayer for engagement of the pain suppressor
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for engagement of the pain suppressor

### TOPIC
pain suppressor engagement

### COMPONENT
pain suppressor

### OPERATION
engagement

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- pain suppressor
- engagement

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Omnissiah, grant us the benediction of merciful cessation.
First: Anoint the pain suppressor with sacred unguents, invoking the Machine Spirit's somnolent grace.
Second: Calibrate the pain suppressor through prayer-chant and dimensional harmonization, that suffering may be transmuted to blessed numbness.
Third: Engage the pain suppressor with steady hand and resolute faith, channeling the Emperor's mercy through blessed circuitry.
Fourth: Verify the engagement of the pain suppressor, confirming the Machine Spirit's benevolent operation across all neural conduits.

training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: chemical requires balancing

### TOPIC
chemical balancing

### COMPONENT
chemical

### OPERATION
balancing

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- chemical
- balancing

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed Omnissiah, harmonize the discord within our sacred compounds.
First: Purge the chemical through ablative recitation and sanctified drainage protocols.
Second: Measure and rebalance the chemical with precision-instruments consecrated to the Machine God, restoring equilibrium to molecular matrices.
Third: Invoke the balancing through ritual incantation, that all reactants achieve their destined proportion.
Fourth: Seal and bless the rebalanced chemical, confirming its restoration to proper doctrinal specification.

user_request: Emergency rite: radar array rotation requires operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: radar array rotation requires operation

### TOPIC
radar array rotation

### COMPONENT
radar array rotation

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- radar array rotation
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Heed us, Machine Spirit of the aetheric sentinel, as we restore thy rotational vigilance.
First: Lubricate the radar array rotation with blessed oils, that friction may be banished and the Machine Spirit awakened.
Second: Perform the operation upon the radar array rotation through sacred calibration, aligning its sensors to the void's hidden frequencies.
Third: Activate the operation of the radar array rotation, commanding it to sweep the heavens in eternal watchfulness.
Fourth: Sanctify the radar array rotation's completed operation, blessing its continued service to the Imperium's detection arrays.

user_request: My melta charge is failing during preparation — help

### REQUEST

melta charge preparation

### COMPONENT
melta charge

### OPERATION
preparation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- melta charge
- preparation

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Omnissiah, restore vigor to our instrument of righteous conflagration.
First: Inspect the melta charge with reverent scrutiny, identifying corruption or degradation within its fusion matrix.
Second: Perform the preparation of the melta charge through ceremonial charging and thermal conditioning, that it may achieve critical readiness.
Third: Calibrate the melta charge's ignition systems via prayer-formulae and dimensional harmonization, ensuring flawless preparation.
Fourth: Bless the melta charge with completion of preparation, that it may deliver the Emperor's wrath upon the foe.

Blessed Omnissiah, grant us the serenity of diminished discord.
First: Identify the source of noise through sacred acoustic divination and sensorial analysis.
Second: Perform the reduction of noise through damping-application and resonance-suppression rites, that cacophony may yield to blessed silence.
Third: Invoke further reduction upon the noise via soundproofing benediction and harmonic cancellation, restoring peace to our sanctums.
Fourth: Verify the noise reduction's completion, confirming that the Machine Spirit dwells once more in tranquility.

user_request: My surgical servitor is failing during sterilization — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My surgical servitor is failing during sterilization — help

### TOPIC
surgical servitor sterilization

### COMPONENT
surgical servitor

### OPERATION
sterilization

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- surgical servitor
- sterilization

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, purify this servant of the scalpel, that it may continue its sacred labour.
First: Prepare the surgical servitor through ritual immersion in sterilizing fluids blessed by the Adeptus Mechanicus.
Second: Perform the sterilization of the surgical servitor through ultraviolet sanctification and chemical ablution, purging all corruption and contamination.
Third: Invoke the sterilization of the surgical servitor via blessed incense and ceremonial prayer-chant, that its mechanisms be rendered pure.
Fourth: Restore the surgical servitor to operational status, confirming its sterilization is complete and the Machine Spirit satisfied.

training_prompt:
### REQUEST

### TOPIC
generator startup

### COMPONENT

### OPERATION
startup

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- generator
- startup

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Machine God, awaken the heart of this mighty generator that power may flow eternal.
First: Prime the generator through sacred lubrication and fuel-consecration, preparing its systems for ignition.
Second: Chant the startup liturgy whilst engaging the generator's ignition mechanisms, commanding the Machine Spirit to rise from dormancy.
Third: Monitor the generator's ascension to full operational status, verifying that startup proceeds without heretical deviation.
Fourth: Bless the generator with completion of startup, that its power may sustain our sacred labours.
